requirement_topic.en: Authorized Qatari Agent / Dealer and Arabic-English Labelling
requirement_topic.zh: 卡塔尔授权代理/经销商及阿拉伯文-英文标签
requirement_topic.zht: 卡塔爾授權代理/經銷商及阿拉伯文-英文標籤

summary.en: A Qatari-registered company or a foreign entity with a registered branch in Qatar must act as the authorized local agent or dealer for CRA type approval registration. The local agent is responsible for applying for CRA type approval, maintaining the approval record, and ensuring post-market compliance. The device label and packaging must display: (1) the CRA type approval certificate number; (2) brand name and model number; (3) rated voltage and frequency (240 V / 50 Hz); (4) country of origin; and (5) the name and contact details of the authorized Qatari agent or importer. All labelling must appear in both Arabic and English. Labels entirely in Chinese are not compliant.
summary.zh: 在卡塔尔注册的公司或在卡塔尔设有注册分支机构的外国实体须担任CRA型号认证注册的授权本地代理或经销商。本地代理负责申请CRA型号认证、维护认证记录及确保售后合规。设备标签和包装须标注：(1) CRA型号认证证书编号；(2) 品牌名称和型号；(3) 额定电压和频率（240 V/50 Hz）；(4) 原产国；(5) 卡塔尔授权代理或进口商的名称和联系方式。所有标签须同时以阿拉伯文和英文显示。纯中文标签不符合要求。
summary.zht: 在卡塔爾註冊的公司或在卡塔爾設有註冊分支機構的外國實體須擔任CRA型號認證註冊的授權本地代理或經銷商。本地代理負責申請CRA型號認證、維護認證記錄及確保售後合規。裝置標籤和包裝須標注：(1) CRA型號認證證書編號；(2) 品牌名稱和型號；(3) 額定電壓和頻率（240 V/50 Hz）；(4) 原產國；(5) 卡塔爾授權代理或進口商的名稱和聯絡方式。所有標籤須同時以阿拉伯文和英文顯示。純中文標籤不符合要求。

standards_or_laws: Qatar Law No. 34 of 2006 on Telecommunications (authorized agent for CRA registration)
CRA Type Approval Procedures and Requirements (labelling and agent obligations)
Qatar Ministry of Commerce and Industry — Commercial Registration requirements
GCC product labelling guidelines (Arabic language requirement)

summary.en: In China, there is no equivalent requirement for a foreign-registered local agent for SRRC or CCC purposes; the applicant may be the manufacturer or their representative. Chinese product labels typically appear in Chinese (Mandarin) and are not required to carry Arabic text. CCC certification is applied for by the manufacturer or its authorized representative in China, not by a local in-country agent.
summary.zh: 在中国，SRRC或CCC申请无需外国注册本地代理的等效要求；申请人可以是制造商或其代表。中国产品标签通常以中文（普通话）显示，无需携带阿拉伯文本。CCC认证由制造商或其在中国的授权代表申请，而非由当地代理申请。
summary.zht: 在中國，SRRC或CCC申請無需外國註冊本地代理的等效要求；申請人可以是製造商或其代表。中國產品標籤通常以中文（普通話）顯示，無需攜帶阿拉伯文本。CCC認證由製造商或其在中國的授權代表申請，而非由當地代理申請。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Radio Type Approval (applicant = manufacturer or authorized representative)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (applicant = manufacturer or authorized representative)
GB 7718 (food labelling — for context; ICT labelling governed by product-specific standards)

gap.en: Two distinct requirements apply uniquely to Qatar: (1) A Qatari-registered local agent or dealer is mandatory for CRA type approval registration; a Chinese manufacturer cannot register directly without a local representative. (2) All device and packaging labels must be in Arabic and English; Chinese-only labels are non-compliant. Chinese manufacturers must engage a Qatari distributor or agent before entering the market, and all label artwork must be redesigned to include Arabic text and the CRA certificate number.
gap.zh: 卡塔尔有两项特有要求：(1) CRA型号认证注册强制要求卡塔尔注册本地代理或经销商；中国制造商未经本地代表不得直接注册。(2) 所有设备和包装标签须以阿拉伯文和英文显示；仅中文标签不合规。中国制造商须在进入市场前委托卡塔尔经销商或代理，并须重新设计所有标签以包含阿拉伯文及CRA证书编号。
gap.zht: 卡塔爾有兩項特有要求：(1) CRA型號認證註冊強制要求卡塔爾註冊本地代理或經銷商；中國製造商未經本地代表不得直接註冊。(2) 所有裝置和包裝標籤須以阿拉伯文和英文顯示；僅中文標籤不合規。中國製造商須在進入市場前委託卡塔爾經銷商或代理，並須重新設計所有標籤以包含阿拉伯文及CRA證書編號。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Qatari-registered local agent or dealer is mandatory for CRA type approval registration. All device and packaging labels must display the CRA certificate number, rated voltage/frequency, country of origin, and authorized agent contact in both Arabic and English. Chinese-only labelling is non-compliant for the Qatar market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CRA型号认证注册强制要求卡塔尔注册本地代理或经销商。所有设备和包装标签须以阿拉伯文和英文同时标注CRA证书编号、额定电压/频率、原产国及授权代理联系方式。仅中文标签不符合卡塔尔市场要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CRA型號認證註冊強制要求卡塔爾註冊本地代理或經銷商。所有裝置和包裝標籤須以阿拉伯文和英文同時標注CRA證書編號、額定電壓/頻率、原產國及授權代理聯絡方式。僅中文標籤不符合卡塔爾市場要求。
